message:
Consolidate dual Proxy paths into shared factory functions

Extract createArrayProxy() and createObjectProxy() factories that
encapsulate the common Proxy handler logic (get, has, ownKeys,
getOwnPropertyDescriptor) shared between wrapDoc and wrapGC.
Both wrappers now build lightweight config objects with backend-specific
callbacks and delegate to the factories, eliminating ~115 lines of
duplicated Proxy boilerplate.
